summary: Phase 3 frontend E2E testing complete. All 49 checks passed across the 3 new pages (Revenue Dashboard, Revenue Radar, Automations), sidebar + mobile bottom nav, and regression of existing modules (dashboard, pazienti, preventivi, appuntamenti, pagamenti, recupero, impostazioni). Seeded data (5 rules, 25 executed runs, 2 failed, 9 radar rows, 4 lost reasons, 8 weekly bars) all render correctly.

issues: Hydration error: <span> rendered as a child of <option> in the 'Assegna a' select (team members map). Browsers strip the span so the value still works, but React logs a hydration error. Recommend rendering plain text in <option> children (e.g. `{u.full_name} · {u.role}` directly without any wrapper).
A11y warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` on DialogContent. Add a <DialogDescription> element under <DialogHeader>.

Recharts console warning during initial mount: width(-1)/height(-1) of ResponsiveContainer. Transient (resolves after first paint) — can be silenced by setting minWidth/minHeight on the 56-high wrapper or using aspect.

action_items: [Low] Fix <span>-in-<option> hydration warning in Automations RuleForm team select (line ~289)
[Low] Add DialogDescription to 'Nuova regola' dialog for a11y
[Low] Optional: set explicit min dimensions on Recharts ResponsiveContainer to silence width(-1) warnings
critical_code_review_comments: Simulate scheduler returned '0 nuovi run, 0 eseguiti' on a freshly-seeded env (seed has already pre-populated 25 executed + 2 failed + 3 scheduled). Not a bug per se, but the button gives ambiguous UX when there is nothing to do — consider surfacing 'Niente da eseguire al momento' when created=0 and executed=0.
Automations.jsx uses `window.confirm` for delete — OK, but for UX consistency with rest of app consider a shadcn AlertDialog.
RevenueDashboard.jsx imports `todayISO`, `fmtDate` that are unused — minor cleanup.
seed_data_creation: None; relied on existing Phase3 seed. Test created and then cleaned up one automation rule 'TEST_Regola_E2E'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 UI is fully functional. Sidebar/BottomNav wired, all 8 KPI testids present, 8 weekly recharts bars render, funnel has all 4 stages, templates/top-open/lost-reasons/MoM all populated, Radar shows 9 rows with top5 + email preview + /recupero CTA, Automations has 5 seeded rules, toggle works, simulate POSTs and toasts, new rule creation works and appears in list, 25 executed / 2 failed / 3 scheduled runs visible. Only cosmetic issues remain (option>span hydration, Dialog a11y, recharts mount warning).
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional issues observed. The only non-functional warning worth fixing is the hydration error caused by the dev-tool `x-*` spans injected into <option> children in Automations.jsx; stripping the span (plain text in option) will remove it.
